chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl.B.A.No. S – 142 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For Hearing of Bail Application. 22-03-2024. Mr.Shabeer Ali Bozdar Advocate alongwith applicant. Mr.Shafi Muhammad Mahar DPG. - O R D E R. ZULIFQUAR ALI SANGI, J- Applicant Waqar Ahmed has sought pre-arrest bail in Crime No. 62/2024 of Police Station, Kandiaro, District Naushahro Feroze, registered under sections 395, 120-B, 341, PPC. He was granted interim pre-arrest bail vide order dated 08.03.2024 and today his bail application has been fixed for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail or otherwise. 2. Heard the arguments of the learned counsel for the applicant and learned DPG and scanned the record. 3. Though the applicant is named in the FIR with the allegation of snatching Car, Purse, USB and cash Rs.18000/- from the complainant party but the Car has been recovered from co-accused Abdul Wahab, Ghulam Mustafa, Nazeer Ahmed and Benazir and nothing has been recovered from the present applicant. Besides this, co-accused Mst.Benazir and Miss.Muskan have been granted bail by the learned trial Court vide order dated 06.03.2024. In such circumstances, the case of the present applicant falls within the ambit of further enquiry. Consequently this bail application is allowed and the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant Waqar Ahmed on 08.03.2024 is hereby confirmed on same terms and condition. Crl.B.A.No.S- 142 of 2024 stands disposed of. JUDGE Akber.
